title: NIAB Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Various Field Assistant Posts
description: BRIC-National Institute of Animal Biotechnology (NIAB) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Field Assistant Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the B.Sc Diploma can grab this chance and apply for the NIAB Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates apply online before the last date of applicati...
